messages.body: Hello Enanga,  Hope you’re doing well!  Can we connect today over a quick call?
Hi, im available tomorrow Saturday through Wednesday for a call.
Really sorry for the inconvenience, monisha is unavailable today can we schedule this for Monday or Tuesday as per your convenience?

Hi, good day. I'm reaching out regarding the above charge to my account.  I had in notified the team that I will be closing my business temporarily for 5 months as I'm currently away for military service. But unfortunate…
